title: Say hello
prompt: Introduce yourself. Say your name and where you are from.
reference_text: Hello, my name is Alex and I am from Canada.

title: Talk about your family
prompt: Say how many people are in your family.
reference_text: There are four people in my family.

title: Your favourite hobby
prompt: Tell someone about a hobby you enjoy.
reference_text: I enjoy reading books in the evening.
